title: MAJORITY Pulse 2 Portable Bluetooth Megasound Party Speaker - Black
offers: Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

description.main: Turn your living room into a dance floor with the Majority Pulse 2 speaker. Dual 6.5" speaker drivers and a 1.5" tweeter fill your space with 120 W of rich, room-filling sound. Crisp highs, punchy mids and bass that thumps - your playlist has never sounded so good. Need more oomph? Hit the Bass Boost and feel the floor shake. Perfect for dance tracks, drum & bass, or anything with a drop.
goodToKnow: Turn up the energy with a dynamic light show that pulses to the beat
Channel your inner pop star with karaoke mode and the included wireless microphone
Listen how you like - there's Bluetooth, a USB port and microSD card slot
Up to 8 hours of battery life will see you through into the night
Double the fun by linking up a second speaker for True Wireless Stereo (TWS) sound
